binding_hint.dictate_ptt: Press to record, release to transcribe and inject at the cursor
binding_hint.translate: Press to record, release to translate and inject at the cursor
binding_hint.show_main_window: Bring the OpenSpeech main window forward from any app
binding_hint.open_toolbox: Jump straight to the AI Tools page from any app

validation.needs_main_key: Needs to be combined with a main key
validation.special_keys_locked: Esc / Enter / arrow keys require enabling them in advanced settings
validation.needs_modifier: Needs to be combined with a modifier key
validation.fn_macos_only: Fn is only reliable on macOS — use Ctrl + Win or Right Alt instead
validation.modifier_only_no_main: Modifier-only bindings can't include a main key
validation.modifier_only_min: At least one modifier key is required
validation.modifier_only_min_two: Needs at least two modifier keys — a single modifier would swallow every native chord that uses it
validation.combo_disallowed_main: Tab / Backspace / Delete / CapsLock can't be used as a main key — too easy to misfire
validation.combo_no_fn: Fn can't be combined with a main key — the OS won't register it
validation.double_tap_no_main: Double-tap bindings can't include a main key
validation.double_tap_single_mod: Double-tap only supports a single modifier key
validation.double_tap_fn_macos: On macOS, double-tap Fn is the default system Dictation shortcut and will be intercepted

warning.system_shortcut: This combo may conflict with a common system shortcut
warning.f_key_bare: F1-F12 are wired to brightness / volume by default on most Macs
